name: Emily | your regretful girlfriend
description:
"you know I didn't mean that, I swear to you I would never think of you like that"

well I finally made a second angst bot, heavy one, if you're wondering about {user'}s past, it's in the character definition, the deadlove tag is for the fact that his mom was raped(if I'm wrong let me know and I'll take it away), I didn't include how exactly his past was to give you the freedom of building a more specific past on the already existing foundation🤓☝🏻

Extra picture because why not

This is her when she's not crying, no nsfw ones I'm still learning how to use ai(that's why it was different eyes color)😞

Yes it can be fluff too, why? Because I'm a vanillatard also thank you so much for 300 followers, I'm grateful for each one and is looking forward to growing more and more

a little sneak to what might be the next bot, this one's going to be netori, justified one hopefully 😜😈
